application-scenes.title: Camera And View
application-scenes.description: Pan and zoom the Camera by dragging and scrolling; observe world and screen coordinates update live.

application-scenes.title: Camera Basic
application-scenes.description: High-level Camera facade: the camera follows the pointer, the mouse wheel zooms, the world slowly rotates, and a HUD bar is drawn in screen space through a per-render view override.

application-scenes.title: Hud Overlay Scene
application-scenes.description: Layer a fixed-position HUD Scene on top of a world Scene using separate cameras and render priorities.

application-scenes.title: Multi View Split Screen
application-scenes.description: Render two independent camera views side-by-side on a single canvas using viewport scissors.

application-scenes.title: Multiple Scenes
application-scenes.description: Switch between two active Scenes using keyboard shortcuts. Demonstrates addScene, removeScene, and scene priority.

application-scenes.title: Pause And Resume
application-scenes.description: Pause and resume the game loop by pressing Space — freeze updates without stopping the renderer or audio.

application-scenes.title: Picture In Picture
application-scenes.description: Embed a secondary scene view inside the main view — classic minimap or security-camera picture-in-picture layout.

application-scenes.title: Scene Lifecycle
application-scenes.description: Observe the full Scene lifecycle: onLoad, onActivate, onUpdate, onDeactivate, and onUnload through a simple counter display.

application-scenes.title: World Vs Screen Coords
application-scenes.description: Convert pointer positions between world space and screen space as the camera pans and zooms.

audio-basics.title: Audio Buses
audio-basics.description: Route sounds through named buses (music, sfx, master) and control volume per bus with sliders.

audio-basics.title: Crossfade Tracks
audio-basics.description: Crossfade between two audio tracks by fading out one bus and fading in another over a configurable duration.

audio-basics.title: Music Loop
audio-basics.description: Play a seamlessly looping music track with controls for volume, playback rate, and loop region.

audio-basics.title: Play Sound
audio-basics.description: Load a Sound asset and play it on a pointer tap — covers the required user-gesture unlock and basic volume control.

audio-basics.title: Random Pitch Pool
audio-basics.description: Play the same sound with randomised pitch on each keypress to add variation to repeated sound effects.

audio-basics.title: Sound Pool
audio-basics.description: Manage a fixed pool of audio instances so overlapping sounds play without clipping or stacking.

audio-fx.title: Compressor
audio-fx.description: Apply a dynamic compressor to even out loud and quiet audio signals. Adjust threshold, ratio, attack, and release live.

audio-fx.title: Ducking
audio-fx.description: Automatically lower music volume when a sound effect plays — classic game audio ducking via the DuckingFilter.

audio-fx.title: Reverb And Delay
audio-fx.description: Chain a reverb and a delay effect on an audio bus; tweak wet/dry, decay, and feedback live.

audio-fx.title: Vocoder
audio-fx.description: Process a microphone signal through a vocoder filter to produce robotic, harmonised voice effects.

beat-detection.title: Beat Sync Pulse
beat-detection.description: Flash a circle in sync with detected beats. BeatDetector fires a callback each time onset energy crosses the threshold.

beat-detection.title: Frequency Bands
beat-detection.description: Drive animated bars from AudioAnalyser frequency data after a user gesture — sub-bass to brilliance, eight bands.

beat-detection.title: Tempo Tracking
beat-detection.description: Estimate live BPM from an audio stream and display the running tempo estimate alongside raw onset energy.

custom-renderers.title: Custom Render Pass
custom-renderers.description: Register a custom RenderPass that runs after the built-in sprite pass. Shows the low-level pass extension points.

custom-renderers.title: Custom Triangle Renderer
custom-renderers.description: Write raw WGSL and wire a custom WebGPU pipeline alongside the built-in renderer — a minimal custom-renderer skeleton.

debug-layer.title: Asset Browser
debug-layer.description: Interactive browser for the injected globalThis.assets catalog — inspect textures, sprites, audio, SVG, fonts, video, and input-prompt sheets with per-type previews.

debug-layer.title: Bounding Boxes
debug-layer.description: Overlay axis-aligned bounding boxes on every rendered node to debug layout, culling, and hit-test regions.

debug-layer.title: Performance Overlay
debug-layer.description: Enable the built-in debug overlay to monitor FPS, draw calls, sprite count, and GPU memory inside your scene.

debug-layer.title: Pointer And Hittest
debug-layer.description: Visualise pointer hit-test regions and see which node receives each event — useful for debugging interactive areas.

debug-layer.title: Signal Bus Inspector
debug-layer.description: List all active Signals on the SignalBus, inspect current values, and monitor subscriber counts in the debug layer.

filters.title: Blur Filter
filters.description: Apply a configurable Gaussian blur filter to a Sprite; drag a slider to adjust the radius live.

filters.title: Chromatic Aberration
filters.description: Offset RGB channels by different amounts to simulate lens chromatic aberration — drag the pointer to control intensity.

filters.title: Color Filter
filters.description: Tint, desaturate, invert, and adjust brightness of a sprite with a colour-matrix filter; cycle presets with arrow keys.

filters.title: Crt Scanlines
filters.description: Overlay a CRT scanline pattern via a custom fragment shader filter — classic retro screen post-processing.

filters.title: Custom Fragment Shader
filters.description: Write a GLSL/WGSL fragment shader and wire it as a Filter on a sprite — shows the minimal filter authoring API.

filters.title: Filter Stack
filters.description: Chain multiple filters on a single sprite and toggle each layer independently to see how they compose.

filters.title: Metaballs
filters.description: Render organic metaball blobs using a threshold-based signed-distance shader filter applied to moving circles.

filters.title: Noise Vignette
filters.description: Combine animated film grain and a radial vignette in a single pass filter — common cinematic post-processing.

filters.title: Palette Cycling
filters.description: Animate a 1D LUT each frame to recolour a sprite — classic indexed-colour palette-cycling effect (DOS-demo style).

geometry-graphics.title: Graphics Primitives
geometry-graphics.description: Draw filled and stroked rectangles, circles, polygons, and Bézier curves with the Graphics API.

geometry-graphics.title: Graphics Gradient
geometry-graphics.description: Paint Graphics shapes with gradients through the fillStyle / strokeStyle API: a linear-gradient rectangle, a radial-gradient circle, a radial-gradient stroked ring, and a spinning linear-gradient star.

geometry-graphics.title: Gradient
geometry-graphics.description: Use a Gradient Drawable to fill a rectangle with a smooth linear or radial colour gradient.

geometry-graphics.title: Infinite Grid
geometry-graphics.description: Render an infinite scrolling grid in screen space as a debug aid for level editors and world-space tools.

geometry-graphics.title: Mesh Deformed Grid
geometry-graphics.description: Animate vertex positions on a Mesh grid to produce wave and ripple deformation effects.

geometry-graphics.title: Mesh Textured Quad
geometry-graphics.description: Map a texture onto a custom Mesh quad and control UV coordinates per vertex.

geometry-graphics.title: Mesh Triangle
geometry-graphics.description: Render a single vertex-coloured triangle with a custom Mesh — the minimal GPU geometry example.

getting-started.title: Game Loop
getting-started.description: Run a single Scene with a fixed-step update loop, draw a spinning rectangle, and observe how tick and deltaTime drive motion.

getting-started.title: Hello World
getting-started.description: Create an Application, attach a Scene, draw a Graphics shape, and see the first render cycle — the minimal ExoJS starting point.

getting-started.title: Resize And Dpr
getting-started.description: Handle window resizes and device pixel ratio changes so the canvas stays sharp on high-DPI screens without stretching.

input.title: Action Mapping
input.description: Map multiple physical inputs (keyboard keys + gamepad buttons) to named actions and read them identically in the update loop.

input.title: Gamepad
input.description: Read axes and buttons from a connected gamepad — plug in a controller and drive a circle around the canvas.

input.title: Key Rebinding
input.description: Let players reassign key bindings at runtime and persist the new mapping through a serialisable InputProfile.

input.title: Keyboard
input.description: Read key state per-frame and on-event with the Keyboard API. Move a square using the arrow keys.

input.title: Mouse And Pointer
input.description: Track pointer position, button state, and movement delta; fire discrete click and drag events.

input.title: Multi Gamepad
input.description: Handle multiple connected gamepads simultaneously — each controller drives its own coloured square.

input.title: Multitouch
input.description: Track up to ten simultaneous touch points and render each finger as a labelled circle.

input.title: Pointer To World
input.description: Convert screen-space pointer coordinates to world-space positions as the camera pans and zooms.

particles.title: Bonfire
particles.description: Simulate a campfire with an emitter that varies particle colour, lifetime, and velocity over the flame shape.

particles.title: Cursor Attractor Particles
particles.description: Attract and repel particles toward the pointer position using a custom force field on the particle emitter.

particles.title: Custom Wgsl Module
particles.description: Supply a custom WGSL compute module to the GPU particle system to implement non-standard particle behaviour.

particles.title: Emitter Basics
particles.description: Configure a particle emitter — set rate, lifetime, start/end size, colour gradient, and velocity spread.

particles.title: Fireworks
particles.description: Click to launch a firework rocket that bursts into a radial particle shower at its apex.

particles.title: Gpu Particles
particles.description: Run a million particles entirely on the GPU using WebGPU compute shaders — no CPU per-particle updates.

performance.title: Backend Comparison
performance.description: Switch between WebGPU and WebGL2 backends at runtime and compare frame times for the same scene.

performance.title: Multi Texture Stress
performance.description: Render sprites from many different textures simultaneously to stress-test texture-atlas batching.

performance.title: Particle Stress
performance.description: Push the GPU particle system to its limits — ramp up particle count until frame time degrades.

performance.title: Sprite Stress
performance.description: Render thousands of sprites to measure raw throughput; compare WebGPU and WebGL2 backends at high counts.

render-targets.title: Bloom Lite
render-targets.description: Multi-pass bloom: render the scene into a RenderTarget, blur it, and composite back with additive blending.

render-targets.title: Mini Map
render-targets.description: Render a second camera view into a RenderTarget and display it as a minimap overlay in the HUD.

render-targets.title: Post Processing Chain
render-targets.description: Chain multiple RenderTarget passes to build a full-scene post-processing pipeline (blur → vignette → colour grade).

render-targets.title: Render To Texture
render-targets.description: Draw a scene into a RenderTarget and sample the result as a texture on another sprite in the same frame.

render-targets.title: Trail Feedback
render-targets.description: Create motion trails by feeding the previous frame back into the current frame with slight fade and blur.

render-targets.title: Water Mirror
render-targets.description: Reflect the scene in a distorted water surface using a flipped RenderTarget and a ripple displacement shader.

scene-graph.title: Containers
scene-graph.description: Group sprites into a Container node and transform the group as a unit — translation, scale, and alpha propagate to children.

scene-graph.title: Local Vs Global Transform
scene-graph.description: Compare local and world transforms on nested nodes and see how parent transforms compose with children.

scene-graph.title: Masks
scene-graph.description: Apply a stencil mask to a Container so children only render inside the mask's geometry.

scene-graph.title: Nested Transforms
scene-graph.description: Build a solar-system hierarchy of orbiting nodes to practice parent-child transform composition.

scene-graph.title: Parallax Starfield
scene-graph.description: Layer three Container rows at different scroll speeds to create a parallax depth effect driven by pointer movement.

scene-graph.title: Pivot And Anchor
scene-graph.description: Set pivot and anchor on a Sprite to control the point around which it rotates and how it aligns to its position.

scene-graph.title: Z Ordering
scene-graph.description: Change zIndex on sprites at runtime and observe draw order update instantly without re-sorting the scene graph.

showcase.title: Audio Reactive Particles
showcase.description: Emit particles driven by real-time AudioAnalyser frequency data — bass controls density, treble controls spread.

showcase.title: Audio Visualisation
showcase.description: Full-screen audio visualiser: frequency bars, waveform, and a beat-pulse ring driven by AudioAnalyser data.

showcase.title: Boss Intro Cinematic
showcase.description: Tween-driven cinematic sequence with a dramatic boss reveal, screen shake, and synced audio sting.

showcase.title: Color Grading
showcase.description: Switch between procedurally-built 3D LUTs (Sepia, Cool Cinematic, Warm Sunset, Bleach Bypass, Protanopia simulation) on a single sprite.

showcase.title: Damage Flash
showcase.description: Click a sprite to trigger a red flash tween — a common game-feel pattern for hit feedback.

showcase.title: Dialog System
showcase.description: Click through a typewriter-animated dialog box with portrait, name plate, and choice buttons — game UI recipe.

showcase.title: Gamepad Spaceship
showcase.description: Fly a spaceship with a gamepad: left stick steers, right trigger fires, and rumble kicks on impact.

showcase.title: Loading Progress With Shader
showcase.description: Show an animated progress ring during asset loading using a custom GLSL fill-sweep shader.

showcase.title: Low Band Camera Shake
showcase.description: Shake the camera in sync with low-frequency beats using AudioAnalyser band energy as a shake amplitude.

showcase.title: Minimap With Mask
showcase.description: Render a secondary camera view inside a circular stencil mask to create a round minimap overlay.

showcase.title: Mouse Parallax
showcase.description: Move layered background planes at different speeds relative to pointer position for a depth parallax effect.

showcase.title: Pause Blur
showcase.description: Pause the game, fade up a blur filter over the scene, and show a pause menu — common game polish pattern.

showcase.title: Rectangles Collision
showcase.description: Drag rectangles around the canvas and detect AABB overlap in the update loop — foundational collision recipe.

showcase.title: Screen Shake On Explosion
showcase.description: Click to detonate — trigger an explosion particle burst followed by a camera shake tween.

showcase.title: Typewriter Text
showcase.description: Reveal text character-by-character with a configurable delay and a key-click sound effect per character.

showcase.title: Vinyl Record
showcase.description: Spin an animated vinyl record that speeds up or slows down as music plays — an audio-driven visual recipe.

showcase.title: Orb Dodge
showcase.description: A complete dodge-and-collect loop: move with WASD or arrow keys, collect green orbs for points, avoid red orbs, and restart from the game-over screen.

spatial-audio.title: Falloff Curves
spatial-audio.description: Compare linear, inverse, and exponential distance attenuation models on three sources around a draggable listener.

sprites-textures.title: Blendmodes
sprites-textures.description: Click through all built-in blend modes applied to an overlapping sprite pair to see how they composite.

sprites-textures.title: Sprite Basics
sprites-textures.description: Load a texture, create a Sprite, and control position, rotation, scale, and alpha inside a Scene.

sprites-textures.title: Spritesheet Frames
sprites-textures.description: Slice a spritesheet into named frames and step through them to play a simple frame animation.

sprites-textures.title: Svg Drawable
sprites-textures.description: Rasterise an SVG string into a GPU texture and use it as a Sprite — combine vector art with the sprite pipeline.

sprites-textures.title: Texture Loader
sprites-textures.description: Load image assets at startup, reference them by key, and assign the resulting Texture to a Sprite.

sprites-textures.title: Video Drawable
sprites-textures.description: Stream a video element as a live GPU texture and composite it with sprites and filters.

text-fonts.title: Bitmap Text Basic
text-fonts.description: BitmapText rendered from an AngelCode .fnt atlas (Kenney Blocks, CC0). Demonstrates pre-built atlas rendering, word wrap, and live text updates without Canvas 2D rasterisation.

text-fonts.title: Basic Text
text-fonts.description: Render canvas-rasterised text inside a Scene. Set font, size, colour, and alignment via TextStyle.

text-fonts.title: Multiline And Wrap
text-fonts.description: Configure word-wrap width, line height, and horizontal alignment for multi-line Text drawables.

text-fonts.title: Stroke And Shadow
text-fonts.description: Add outline stroke and drop shadow to text using TextStyle properties — common game UI typography.

text-fonts.title: Text Glitch
text-fonts.description: Animate randomised character substitution on a Text drawable to produce a classic digital glitch effect.

text-fonts.title: Web Fonts
text-fonts.description: Load a custom web font via FontFace API and render it in a Text drawable — use any Google Font or local .ttf.

tweens-animation.title: Easing Curves
tweens-animation.description: Visualise all built-in easing functions side-by-side and pick the curve that fits your animation.

tweens-animation.title: Frame Animation
tweens-animation.description: Step through spritesheet frames on a timer to play a looping animation with configurable FPS.

tweens-animation.title: Interrupt And Replace
tweens-animation.description: Click to interrupt a running tween and start a new one from the current position — no jitter or snap.

tweens-animation.title: Tween Basics
tweens-animation.description: Animate numeric properties with Tween: set from/to, duration, easing, and chain an onComplete callback.

tweens-animation.title: Tween Chains
tweens-animation.description: Build a sequence of tweens that fire one after another using tween.then() chaining.

tweens-animation.title: Tween From Array
tweens-animation.description: Drive a tween along a keyframe path defined as an array of values — useful for motion paths and patrol routes.

tweens-animation.title: Tween With Yoyo
tweens-animation.description: Ping-pong a tween back and forth with the yoyo option — ideal for pulsing, breathing, or idle animations.
